title: Large Rectangular Wooden Serving Tray with Large Handle in Black Wood (40x28 cm)
features: The serving tray is made of northeast Chinese ash wood. The dimensions of this item are 40 x 28 x 3.5 cm.

The wooden tray is made of original wood grain material, is food safe, environmentally friendly and elegant with wide handles for easy grip. The surrounding shell lips prevent items from falling over.
The simple breakfast tray can hold cups, plates, food, vegetables, sugar, fruit, etc. as a room service tray, which saves a lot of space for your living room and kitchen.
The butter tray is perfect for restaurants, hotels, homes and cafes. Ideal for designing home accessories. Features large serving area, high sides and cut out handles.
The large black rectangular tray is multifunctional.
description: Product Description Dudoplatz Witness the good times you had Palettes for every need Japanese food and Dudoplatz trays are a perfect match! But it's not just Japanese food, the black tray makes it possible to perform in almost any environment, whether at home, in a restaurant or in the office. The generous surface offers space for your delicious dishes and the light weight makes transport effortless. On the stable tray you can also transport food for several people at the same time, so you can enjoy a pleasant meal with your friends. Commitment to packaging reduction We aim to minimize packaging during transportation, which in turn lessens the CO2 emissions and environmental consequences linked with the creation and disposal of packaging Black exterior, wood grain, always classic design From time to time, we ask ourselves where our pallet products are used: in the company office, in a restaurant or at home? Is there a product that can be used in all these places at the same time? This is our answer to this question. The style is generous and elegant. The black colour allows them all to be used at any time and, above all, the veins of the trees are visible on the tray that we have used as a natural decoration. More to share, maximum pleasure Light as a feather, but strong Can support up to 15 kg Nature's friend Functions Thickened side walls For the side walls of our pallets, we use thicker (hand-drawn) bamboo wood. Curved handle Large handles on both sides of the tray make transporting food a less delicate matter. Smooth polished Each product goes through a 16-step process before it reaches the market to ensure a smooth surface on every item. A natural pattern Each palette has its own natural texture, none resembles the other.
